It verifies the presence of the source directory, then reads all files within it. Each file is read, encoded in Base64, and stored in an object. The object is serialized into a JSON string embedded within JavaScript code and written to the output file. No malicious code or suspicious behavior is detected; the process is a benign build step for font embedding. There are no signs of obfuscation, malware, or malicious data exfiltration.",
